__fixture__.summary: A window crosses between displays with different scale factors or the OS changes the per-monitor DPI bucket. Aureline preserves readable scale, sheet ownership, and keyboard-visible recovery instead of trusting stale rectangles.

topology.starting_arrangement: window straddling or moving between high-scale and low-scale displays

preserve: readable scale bucket for chrome and editor

must_not_happen: a sheet appears between displays with no visible controls
focus lands on a clipped target outside the safe bounds
mixed-DPI reflow hides the primary recovery action
scale change causes the owning dialog to detach
editor or sheet opens off-screen after the reflow
